cannot-carry.non-player-chest: Carryable Chests: only player chests can be carried.
cannot-carry.open-chest: Carryable Chests: close the chest before carrying it.
cannot-carry.global-inventory-chest: Carryable Chests: global-inventory chests are not supported yet.
cannot-carry.inventory-full: Carryable Chests: your inventory is full.
cannot-carry.remove-world-failed: Carryable Chests: failed to remove the chest from the world.
cannot-carry.add-inventory-failed: Carryable Chests: failed to add the chest to your inventory.
placement.backup-kept: Carryable Chests: backup kept because verification failed.
multiplayer.host-pickup-only: Carryable Chests: only the host can pick up chests in multiplayer for now.
multiplayer.host-place-only: Carryable Chests: only the host can place carried chests in multiplayer for now.
recovery.carried-changed: Carryable Chests: carried chest changed; backup preserved. Place it manually before uninstalling.
recovery.no-safe-tile: Carryable Chests: no safe tile found for a carried chest. Backup preserved.
recovery.orphan-failed: Carryable Chests: an orphaned chest backup could not be restored. See SMAPI log.
recovery.restored-origin: Carryable Chests restored an orphaned chest to its original tile.
recovery.restored-inventory: Carryable Chests restored an orphaned chest to your inventory.
command.recover.summary: Re-scan carried chests and restore any orphaned backups.
